User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Site: PrintKingDriver
# URL: https://www.printkingdriver.com
# Description: Printer driver guides, installation how-tos, technology explainers, and brand-specific support for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

## Key Entry Points
- / (Homepage)
- /drivers (All driver categories)
- /how-it-works (How drivers work)
- /about (About this guide)
- /contact (Contact)
- /glossary (Driver glossary)
- /brands (All printer brands)
- /guides (Installation guides)
- /how-to (How-to articles)
- /tech (Technology explainers)
- /troubleshooting (Troubleshooting guides)
- /all-pages (Full HTML sitemap)

## Driver Reference Pages
- /drivers/chipset (Chipset & motherboard drivers)
- /drivers/graphics (Graphics card drivers)
- /drivers/audio (Audio & sound card drivers)
- /drivers/network (Network & Wi-Fi adapter drivers)
- /drivers/storage (SSD & hard drive controller drivers)
- /drivers/usb (USB controller drivers)
- /drivers/bluetooth (Bluetooth adapter drivers)
- /drivers/input (Keyboard & mouse drivers)
- /drivers/printer (Printer drivers)
- /drivers/scanner (Scanner drivers)
- /drivers/webcam (Webcam drivers)
- /drivers/bios (BIOS & UEFI firmware)
- /drivers/security (Security & TPM drivers)
- /drivers/monitor (Monitor calibration drivers)

- /guides/wifi-printer-setup (Wi-Fi printer setup)

- /guides/linux-printer-setup (Linux printer setup)
- /guides/cloud-printing (Cloud printing)
- /guides/airprint-and-mopria (AirPrint and Mopria)

## How-To Articles
- /how-to/install-printer-driver-windows (Install printer driver on Windows)
- /how-to/install-printer-driver-mac (Install printer driver on Mac)
- /how-to/uninstall-printer-driver (Uninstall printer driver)
- /how-to/update-printer-firmware (Update printer firmware)
- /how-to/add-network-printer (Add a network printer)
- /how-to/clear-print-queue (Clear print queue)
- /how-to/restart-print-spooler (Restart print spooler)
- /how-to/find-printer-ip-address (Find printer IP address)
- /how-to/print-double-sided (Print double-sided)
- /how-to/print-from-iphone (Print from iPhone)
- /how-to/print-from-android (Print from Android)
- /how-to/print-from-chromebook (Print from Chromebook)
- /how-to/print-poster-multipage (Print poster / multi-page)
- /how-to/clean-print-head (Clean print head)
- /how-to/replace-toner-cartridge (Replace toner cartridge)
- /how-to/scan-to-computer (Scan to computer)
- /how-to/scan-to-email (Scan to email)
- /how-to/scan-to-pdf (Scan to PDF)
- /how-to/share-printer-windows (Share printer on Windows)
- /how-to/share-printer-mac (Share printer on Mac)

- /tech/twain-explained (TWAIN explained)

- /tech/print-spooler-explained (Print spooler explained)
